Why Tankua

Benefits of Partnering with Us

Reach More Customers

Access thousands of travelers looking for trusted tour providers. Our platform brings customers directly to you.

Easy Management

Manage your trips, bookings, drivers, and earnings all from one intuitive dashboard.

Guaranteed Payments

Get paid reliably with our secure payment system. Weekly payouts directly to your bank account.

Growth Analytics

Track your performance with detailed reports and insights to help grow your business.

Trust & Credibility

Being on Tankua gives you instant credibility. We verify all providers for customer safety.

Scale Your Business

Whether you have one vehicle or a fleet, our platform scales with your business needs.

Provider Portal

Everything You Need to Run Your Business

Our provider portal gives you all the tools you need to manage your travel business efficiently and professionally.

Create and manage trip listings
Accept online bookings
Manage driver assignments
Track earnings and payouts
View customer reviews
Access performance analytics
Handle cancellations and refunds
24/7 support access
Getting Started

How to Become a Provider

Register

Sign up and submit your business details

2

Verification

We verify your documents and credentials

3

Setup

Add your trips, vehicles, and drivers

4

Start Earning

Accept bookings and grow your business
